name: secure-run-manifest
summary: Secure Run Manifest (`sr-ms`) is a lightweight Python tool to securely lock, manage, and run Python scripts. It uses XOR encryption with PBKDF2 key derivation and allows scripts to be run from memory without exposing the source on disk.
